title: tragopogon ruthenicus subsp. donetzicus
intro: Tragopogon ruthenicus subsp. donetzicus is a subspecies of the salsify plant, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is commonly used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Tragopogon ruthenicus subsp. donetzicus is typically prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and it can also be used as a dietary supplement in capsule or powder form.
